features.title: Capture Modal and OpenAI Agents SDK blog learnings
features.description: Summarize the applicable blog guidance in repo references and link it from the references index.

features.title: Define orchestrator and worker contract
features.description: Specify worker input, output, status, run metadata, failure states, and ownership boundaries.

features.title: Scaffold a single sandboxed worker path
features.description: Create the smallest observable worker workflow using the existing Modal sandbox execution path.

features.title: Add quota-bound async worker pool
features.description: Track active workers, expose status, enforce concurrency and resource quotas, and support timeout/cancellation.

features.title: Add filesystem snapshot and skill hooks
features.description: Allow prepared workspace snapshots and selected skill context once the worker pool is observable.
